title: How To Motivate Your YouTube Team To Get More Views For You

transcript.text: My biggest challenge at scaling on YouTube now is finding people and knowing how much to pay them. >> So, what many people do is they [music] hire on Upwork and they pay per video. What it creates is a transactional relationship where [music] all your people care about is completing videos faster. The way I structure it instead [music] is I like to pay my people per video, plus I set weekly goals. If they complete them, they increase their pay per video and [music] they also start to qualify for view bonus. So, they start making money from results those videos [music] generate for you and not the videos themselves. This way they're motivated to deliver more videos and at the same time they're motivated to deliver better videos because they [music] know that the more views they generate the more money they're going to make themselves.
